title: cleome rotundifolia
intro: Cleome rotundifolia, also known as White Bee Plant or Spider Flower, is a flowering plant species within the Cleomaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cleome rotundifolia include its ability to treat various skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cleome rotundifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although its effectiveness and safety may vary and should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
